entities.name: APSIM MODEL
entities.description: A simulation model used to assess the impact of legumes on sorghum and simulate soil and plant responses

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, the cereal crop grown in rotation with legumes

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata, a legume used in rotation with sorghum

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a legume used in rotation with sorghum

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, a legume used in rotation with sorghum

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient accumulated by legumes and available for uptake by sorghum

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A resource whose availability affects crop growth in semi-arid conditions

entities.name: SOUTH-WESTERN ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The region where the study was conducted

entities.name: LUCYDALE MATOPOS RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The specific site where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental context characterized by dry conditions and water stress

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: A measure of plant growth predicted by the APSIM model

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, predicted by the APSIM model

entities.name: NITROGEN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen produced or accumulated by the legume phase

entities.name: NITROGEN STRESS
entities.description: A state of nutrient limitation affecting sorghum

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A state of water limitation affecting sorghum

entities.name: NUTRIENT-LIMITED SYSTEM
entities.description: A system where essential nutrients are scarce
